Loan repayment is policy-loan maintenance, not a claim event.
Non-collateralized loan taken — borrowed money domain.
Loan interest accrual/capitalization on non-collateralized loans.
Loan payment activity — not claim disbursement.
Loan write-off is borrowed-money accounting, not claim payout.
LifePRO defines 0451 as Unearned Interest Income under Borrowed Money — internal accounting offset, not claim interest (MINTAMT).
Core death benefit establishment — QLAdmin QuikClms Death Claims domain.
